name: AREthRemoveConsumedEventGroup
title: AREthRemoveConsumedEventGroup
description: Removes an Event Group from a Consumed Service Instance. The Event Group was previously added by AREthAddConsumedEventGroup.
The Events, fields, and methods assigned to the Event Group are not deleted when the Eventgroup is closed.

parameters.name: cevgHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the Consumed Event Group.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
